title: Joel Berry II
extract: Joel DeWayne Berry II (born April 1, 1995) is an American former professional basketball player. He played college basketball for the North Carolina Tar Heels and led the team to the 2017 national championship as well as two Atlantic Coast Conference (ACC) regular season and one ACC tournament championship. Berry played professionally for two seasons in the NBA G League and one season in Turkey before his retirement in 2021.
